name: Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and water in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches boiling point.
2. Continue cooking without stirring for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with vanilla extract and salt until stiff peaks form.
5. Gradually pour the cooled syrup into the beaten egg whites, one ladleful at a time, while continuously beating to prevent the mixture from deflating.
6. Once the batter is thick and glossy, drop spoonfuls of it onto waxed paper.
7. Sprinkle nut meats on top of each dollop before the divinity sets.
